name: ProBook Laptop 15
description: 15-inch laptop with Intel Core i7, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, and a full-HD IPS display. Perfect for work and creative tasks.

name: UltraTab Pro 11
description: 11-inch Android tablet with AMOLED display, 8GB RAM, 256GB storage, and 10-hour battery life. Includes stylus.

name: SoundWave Headphones
description: Over-ear wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, 40-hour battery, and Hi-Res audio certification.

name: EcoBrew Coffee Maker
description: 12-cup programmable coffee maker with built-in grinder, thermal carafe, and eco-mode. ENERGY STAR certified.

name: FitTrack Smart Watch
description: Advanced fitness tracker with heart-rate monitoring, GPS, sleep tracking, 7-day battery, and water resistance up to 50m.

name: ErgoDesk Chair
description: Ergonomic office chair with lumbar support, adjustable armrests, breathable mesh back, and 5-year structural warranty.

name: CleanAir Purifier
description: HEPA air purifier covering up to 600 sq ft. Removes 99.97% of particles. Auto mode, quiet sleep mode, air quality display.

name: CookMaster Instant Pot
description: 7-in-1 electric pressure cooker with 6-quart capacity. Pressure cook, slow cook, rice cooker, yogurt maker, and more.

name: SpeedRun Gaming Mouse
description: High-performance wired gaming mouse with 16000 DPI sensor, 6 programmable buttons, and RGB lighting.

name: SmartHome Hub
description: Central hub for smart home devices. Compatible with Zigbee, Z-Wave, and Wi-Fi devices. Works with Alexa and Google Home.

name: Canvas Pro Drawing Tablet
description: Professional drawing tablet with 8192 pressure levels, 13.3-inch display, and tilt recognition. For artists and designers.

name: ThermoGuard Water Bottle
description: 32oz double-wall insulated stainless-steel water bottle. Keeps cold 24h, hot 12h. Leak-proof lid. BPA-free.
